{"description":"DreamerV3 world-model 训练栈迁移完成

## 已完成
- models/blocks.py: MLP, SymLogTwoHotLoss, symlog, symexp, ResNet blocks
- models/state_predictor.py: DepthStateModel (RSSM世界模型)
- models/agent.py: ActorCriticAgent with symlog value function
- wmenv/replaybuffer.py: GPU-based ReplayBuffer
- wmenv/world_state_env.py: DepthStateEnv for imagined rollouts
- wmenv/utils.py: configure_opt, DictConfig utilities
- world.py: World_Agent training entry point

## 代码审查修复
- wmenv/__init__.py: import from correct module
- agent.py: unpack tuple from sample()
- world.py: apply gradients inside loop

已提交到 claude/bootstrap 分支，等待网络恢复后推送","status":"in_progress"}

old_value: {"id":"diffdroneinisaac_workspace-i8x.13","title":"修复 PointMass 动力学断梯度问题","description":"当前 main 上 PointMass 环境可运行，但低层动力学反向传播断裂。conda run -n isaaclab-newton pytest diffaero_newton/tests/test_pointmass_dynamics.py -q 失败，loss.backward() 报 get_flat_state() 无 grad_fn。需要把 PointMass 做成真正可微的低层动力学，而不是仅靠环境 loss 中的 action_rate 项表面可回传。","acceptance_criteria":"1) test_pointmass_dynamics.py 通过。2) 直接对 PointMass get_flat_state() 构造的 loss 反传时，输入 action 梯度非空且非零。3) 不破坏 test_pointmass_env.py 与 unified train entry 的 pointmass smoke。","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"1723946555@qq.com","created_at":"2026-03-16T11:45:55Z","created_by":"sycamore-yu","updated_at":"2026-03-16T11:45:55Z"}

old_value: {"id":"diffdroneinisaac_workspace-24b","title":"Fix SHAC standalone obstacle update inplace autograd regression","description":"QA validation found that diffaero_newton/tests/test_obstacle_training.py::TestIntegration::test_training_iteration fails when SHAC performs a standalone update on obstacle training, raising a PyTorch inplace autograd error during actor backward. This is a source-level differentiable training bug, not a test-layer issue. Repair SHAC/obstacle runtime so a standalone training iteration can be restored as a passing GPU quality gate.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"1723946555@qq.com","created_at":"2026-03-17T03:14:49Z","created_by":"sycamore-yu","updated_at":"2026-03-17T03:14:49Z"}

Completed: obstacle SHAC standalone actor-update no longer triggers the inplace autograd failure on current main. Verified with pytest diffaero_newton/tests/test_obstacle_training.py::TestIntegration::test_training_iteration -q and the full obstacle suite.
